questions.q: As reported on April 14, 2026, 7-Eleven plans to close how many underperforming stores in North America during its 2026 fiscal year?
In a mid-April 2026 memo, Disney CEO Josh D’Amaro announced that the company is currently laying off approximately how many employees to 'streamline' operations?
In an escalating monopoly battle reported on April 14, 2026, what specific group is demanding billions of dollars from Google through a mass arbitration proceeding?
Fueled by renewed momentum in the AI trade, Nvidia's stock recently recorded its longest winning streak since 2023. How many consecutive days did it rise as of April 14, 2026?
To bolster its Leo satellite internet business, Amazon agreed in April 2026 to acquire which satellite operator in a deal worth approximately $11.6 billion?
